impact_summary: Write stalls causing payment retries and failures
cause: Disk usage reached 95% leading to IO throttling

impact_summary: Checkout errors spiked to ~3% immediately after deploy
cause: Regression in error handling after release

impact_summary: Order processing delayed; queue backlog grew 5x
cause: Insufficient worker capacity during traffic spike
notes: Scaled workers and adjusted batch size

impact_summary: 5xx error rate peaked around 12%; purchases failing

notes: Increased memory and tuned eviction policy

impact_summary: Login latency p95 > 1.2s causing slow sign-ins
cause: Cache miss storm on token validation

impact_summary: Homepage unavailable over HTTPS for some users
notes: Renewed certificate and added expiry monitoring
